cannonball 2026-07
  • Reference

Package index

All functions

clustered_data()
Simulate data for a cluster-randomised experiment
lin_plot() var_plot() norm_qq() norm_hist()
Draw diagnostic parades
parade()
Generate dataset for a diagnostic parade
parade_summary()
Summarise residual information in a diagnostic parade per cell or per unique predictor value
plot_r()
Draw different scatterplots corresponding to a sample correlation coefficient
rand_test()
Randomisation testing for two-group comparisons
reveal()
Reveal the true data's position in a diagnostic parade
mean_diff() stud_mean_diff() median_diff() rank_sum() prob_super() ks_stat()
Test statistics for two-group comparisons
walkthrough_blocking()
Walkthrough blocking on a covariate
walkthrough_p()
Walkthrough p-values
